uplink.description: Status report, ppb unit, normal battery
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame; expected.data authored here, wire values cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3.6, TVOC 100 ppb, Temp 26.3, Humi 60).

uplink.description: Status report, index unit, low battery, negative temperature
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame exercising the low-battery flag (byte3 high bit), two's-complement negative temperature (0xFF9C) and the index unit; cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt low 3.6, TVOC 300 index, Temp -1, Humi 44.64).

uplink.description: Status report, zero humidity, full-scale TVOC
uplink._note: Synthetic in-bounds frame at the humidity lower bound (0%); cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3.3, TVOC 1000 ppb, Temp 25, Humi 0).
Synthetic in-bounds frame at the humidity upper bound (100%); cross-checked against reference/upstream-codec.js (Volt 3.6, TVOC 50 ppb, Temp 25, Humi 100).

uplink.description: Startup version report carries no measurement
uplink._note: reportType 0x00 (bytes[2] == 0) is a device-info/startup frame (SW/HW version + datecode) with no measurement; surfaced as an error. Input shape matches the upstream startup example.

uplink.description: Configure report response on fPort 7 is unsupported
uplink._note: fPort 7 carries config command responses, not measurements; surfaced as an error. Input shape matches the upstream ConfigReportRsp example.
